code:
value Account
  balance: Int
end

type TxError =
  | Overdraft

fn deposit(_ acc: Account, _ amount: Int) -> Account
  acc.copy(balance: acc.balance + amount)
end

fn withdraw(_ acc: Account, _ amount: Int) -> Result<Account, TxError>
  if amount > acc.balance
    Err(TxError.Overdraft)
  else
    Ok(acc.copy(balance: acc.balance - amount))
  end
end

let a0 = Account(balance: 100)
let a1 = deposit(a0, 50)

mut final_acc = a1
mut status = "ok"

match withdraw(a1, 30)
when Ok(a2)
  final_acc = a2
  status = "ok"
when Err(Overdraft)
  status = "overdraft"
end

match withdraw(final_acc, 500)
when Ok(a3)
  final_acc = a3
  status = "ok"
when Err(Overdraft)
  status = "overdraft"
end

println("final_balance=#{final_acc.balance}")
println("last_status=#{status}")
